Please remit the outstanding amount by the close of business today. If you have already paid, provide proof of payment immediately.

Failure to address this matter promptly will result in additional fees and possible suspension of services.

communicationHistory.subject: Urgent: Overdue Invoice INV-102 - Immediate Payment Required
communicationHistory.body:
Dear Amit,

This is an urgent notice regarding your outstanding invoice INV-102 for ₹12000, which became overdue on 2026-04-20.

As of today, this invoice is 23 days past due. We have not yet received payment despite previous reminders.

This is Stage 4 of our collections process. Failure to settle this amount immediately will result in:
- Additional late fees of 2% per week
- Suspension of any ongoing services
- Escalation to our legal department for recovery proceedings

Please remit payment of ₹12000 within 24 hours to avoid further action. You can transfer to our account details or contact our billing department immediately.

Time is critical. We look forward to your prompt response.

Regards,
Billing Department

communicationHistory.subject: Immediate Action Required: Overdue Invoice INV-104 – ₹31,000
communicationHistory.body:
Dear Vikram Joshi,

Our records indicate that Invoice INV-104 for ₹31,000, due on 2026-04-18, is now 25 days overdue. This delay is unacceptable and requires your immediate attention.

Please remit the outstanding amount no later than 2026-05-15 to avoid further penalties or suspension of services. If payment has already been made, forward the confirmation to us promptly.

Failure to address this matter swiftly will result in escalated collection actions.

Regards,
Finance Department

communicationHistory.subject: URGENT: Immediate Payment Required - Invoice INV-104 Overdue by 25 Days
communicationHistory.body:
Dear Vikram Joshi,

This letter serves as a formal and urgent notice regarding the overdue payment on Invoice INV-104.

Invoice Details:
- Invoice Number: INV-104
- Amount Due: ₹31,000
- Original Due Date: April 18, 2026
- Days Overdue: 25

Despite multiple reminders, payment remains outstanding. Your account has now reached Stage 4 of our collections process, and we demand immediate resolution.

You are required to remit the full amount of ₹31,000 within 7 days of this notice. Failure to comply will result in immediate escalation to our legal and collections department, which may include:
- Reporting to credit bureaus
- Engagement of third-party collection agencies
- Legal proceedings to recover outstanding dues

All additional costs incurred due to delayed payment, including legal fees and interest charges, will be your responsibility.

We urge you to treat this matter with the utmost seriousness and process payment immediately to avoid further consequences.

Please confirm payment within 7 business days.

Regards,
Finance Collections Team
